title: Diabetes screening and glycemic reassessment basics
summary: Re-check abnormal glycemic markers and combine them with symptoms, longitudinal trend, and follow-up planning.

title: Kidney complication review for diabetes follow-up
summary: Albuminuria and reduced eGFR should trigger closer renal review and treatment-choice caution.

title: Retinal follow-up and lifestyle management reminders
summary: Retinal findings, blood pressure control, and lifestyle adherence should be reviewed together.
